name: Radish or Cucumber Salad (Korean)
recipeInstructions:
preferably Korean chili flakes (2 teaspoons make a very hot salad)
Peel radish and cut into matchstick pieces about 2 inches long.
Sprinkle with salt and let stand for 10 minutes. Rinse to remove excess salt and drain well. Wrap radish in several thicknesses of cheesecloth and squeeze out as much liquid as possible. In a bowl, combine radish with red pepper flakes, sugar, vinegar, scallion, and garlic, mixing well. Serve immediately or refrigerate to blend flavors.
Serves 8 as side dish.
